commands.summary: RP00 control-plane contract validation passed for RP00.P00.M03.S01 in production_ready state after C00 review and construction inspection.
Spec requirement ledger validation passed with 227 requirements.
Law Firm OS product contract validation passed with 9 modules, 9 principles, and 7 invariants.
Weighted implementation ledger validation passed with 3,300 source micro phases and 54,355 implementation subphases.
Goal closeout protocol validation passed for all goals with claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.
Lifecycle gate definition is metadata-only and does not mutate product state.
